ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number of the player in the draft */,
  "nba_debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the player made their NBA debut */,
  "retired_year" INTEGER /* Year the player retired */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's current team */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "last_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the last team the player played for */,
  "career_high_score" INTEGER /* The highest score the player has achieved in a single game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_last_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abv" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team participates in */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "retired_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was retired (if applicable) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* The name of the team owner */,
  "assistant_coach_name" TEXT /* The name of the assistant coach */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* The location of the home stadium (city and state) */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* The primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* The team mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract ends */,
  "total_salary" REAL /* Total salary over the contract period */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "performance_clauses" TEXT /* Performance clauses in the contract */,
  "guaranteed_salary" REAL /* The guaranteed portion of the salary */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Any additional incentives or bonuses */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* The status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, option year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Number of days for recovery */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* The severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* The current status of the player's rehabilitation */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* A summary of the player's injury history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coach, assistant coach, trainer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the staff member */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the staff member's contract expires */,
  "position" TEXT /* The specific position or role within the staff */,
  "education" TEXT /* The educational background of the staff member */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game in the schedule */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the game is home or away */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 102-98) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* The time of the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* The TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* The type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedule_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedule_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team standings record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Central, Atlantic) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Number of games behind the division leader */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* The team's record at home */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* The team's record on the road */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* The team's record within their conference */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* The team's record within their division */,
  "streak" TEXT /* The current win/loss streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team financial record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the team */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the team */,
  "player_salaries" REAL /* Total salaries paid to players */,
  "staff_salaries" REAL /* Total salaries paid to staff */,
  "stadium_expenses" REAL /* Expenses related to the stadium */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Marketing budget */,
  "profit" REAL /* Net profit of the team */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses of the team */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the team */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_finances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., All-Star, MVP) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_level" TEXT /* The level of the award (e.g., league, conference, division) */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* The type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team history record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "conference_titles" INTEGER /* Number of conference titles won */,
  "division_titles" INTEGER /* Number of division titles won */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "best_season_record" TEXT /* Best season record (e.g., 64-18) */,
  "worst_season_record" TEXT /* Worst season record (e.g., 20-62) */,
  "all_time_record" TEXT /* The team's all-time record */,
  "all_time_points_for" INTEGER /* The total points scored by the team in their history */,
  "all_time_points_against" INTEGER /* The total points scored against the team in their history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The level of access (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., player, team, game) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's device */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
